news.t: ProShares Launches Groundbreaking Suite of Dynamic Buffer ETFs

overview.description: The ProShares Russell 2000 Dynamic Buffer ETF (RB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Cboe Russell 2000 Daily Buffer index. The fund tracks an index that invests in the Russell 2000 stocks while employing an options strategy designed to provide capped gains and buffer against the first 1% to 5% of Russell 2000s losses. RB was launched on Jun 24, 2025 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Launches Groundbreaking Suite of Dynamic Buffer ETFs
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares Dynamic Buffer ETFs capture gains and target downside protection with a patent-pending approach that adapts daily to expected volatility.
